nasb.text: A good man leaves an inheritance to his children’s children, And the wealth of the sinner is stored up for the righteous.

esv.text: A good man leaves an inheritance to his children’s children, but the sinner’s wealth is laid up for the righteous.

cnv.text: 善人給子孫留下產業， 罪人的財富，卻是為義人積藏。

ccb.text: 善人为子孙留下产业， 罪人给义人积聚财富。

csbs.text: 好人使子子孙孙得继业； 罪人的财富，却为义人留存。
